summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 4 warning, 11 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:165 — `slugToBranch("..")` returns `".."` (truthy), bypassing the `if (!safeSlug)` guard; resulting path `.team/worktrees/..` resolves to `.team/`. Add `if (/^\.+$/.test(safeSlug)) throw new Error(...)` and a regression test.
No 🔴 findings — feature passes; one 🟡 to backlog.

No 🔴 or 🟡 findings — implementation matches the spec sentence verbatim and delivers concrete user value (no cross-contamination on parallel `agt run`). Full PM eval appended to `.team/features/git-worktree-isolation/tasks/task-6/eval.md`.
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:164 — Slug sanitization allows `".."` to escape `.team/worktrees/`; verified by direct probe → returned `cwd/.team`. Handshake's path-traversal claim is incomplete.
🟡 test/worktree.test.mjs:486 — Path-traversal test only covers `"../evil"` (sanitizes to harmless `"..evil"`), missing the actually-traversing `".."`, `"..."`, `"."` cases.
🟡 test/worktree.test.mjs:497 — Windows `\\` path branch is speculative on a POSIX-only test target; drop it
